meta.title: 小学生必背古诗
meta.subtitle: Classical Chinese Poems for Primary School

fields.poem: id, title, titlePinyin, titleEn, author, dynasty, grade, volume, lines[], chars[], notes{}
fields.line: text, pinyin, zh (白话译文), en (translation)
fields.char: char, pinyin, zh (字义), en (gloss); deduplicated within a poem, 多音字 noted in zh
fields.notes: background / culture / rhetoric, each { zh, en }
fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.pinyin: yuǎn shàng hán shān shí jìng xié
lines.zh: 一条石头小路弯弯曲曲地伸向远处深秋的山上。
lines.en: A stone path winds far up the cold autumn mountain.

lines.pinyin: bái yún shēng chù yǒu rén jiā
lines.zh: 在白云升起飘浮的地方，隐约有几户人家。
lines.en: Where the white clouds rise, a few houses can be seen.

lines.pinyin: tíng chē zuò ài fēng lín wǎn
lines.zh: 停下车来，是因为喜爱这傍晚时分的枫树林。
lines.en: I stop my carriage, charmed by the maple grove at dusk.

lines.pinyin: shuāng yè hóng yú èr yuè huā
lines.zh: 经霜的枫叶比二月里盛开的鲜花还要红艳。
lines.en: Frosted leaves are redder than flowers in spring.

chars.zh: 地方（多音字：chǔ 指处理）。
车子（多音字：jū 象棋棋子）。

background.zh: 杜牧是晚唐著名诗人，此诗写他在深秋山间行走时所见的美景。
background.en: Du Mu, a major Late Tang poet, wrote this on the beauty he saw walking in the late-autumn hills.

culture.zh: “霜叶红于二月花”是千古名句，赞美秋天枫叶之美胜过春花。
culture.en: The famous line declares frosted maple leaves lovelier than spring blossoms.

rhetoric.zh: 运用对比手法，以“红于二月花”突出秋色，由远及近层层展开画面。
rhetoric.en: It uses contrast and a far-to-near progression to paint the autumn scene.

sandhi.zh: "远"是上声，在非上声"上"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yuǎn。
sandhi.en: 远 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 上; the written pinyin stays yuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"人"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 人; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "坐"是去声，在去声"爱"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zuò。
sandhi.en: 坐 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 爱; the written pinyin stays zuò.

sandhi.zh: "二"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：èr。
sandhi.en: 二 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays èr.

lines.pinyin: hé jìn yǐ wú qíng yǔ gài
lines.zh: 荷花凋谢了，再也没有像伞一样高举着挡雨的荷叶。
lines.en: The lotuses are gone, no leaves left to hold up against the rain.

lines.pinyin: jú cán yóu yǒu ào shuāng zhī
lines.zh: 菊花凋残了，却还有那傲对寒霜挺立的花枝。
lines.en: The chrysanthemums wither, yet their stems still defy the frost.

lines.pinyin: yī nián hǎo jǐng jūn xū jì
lines.zh: 一年中最美好的景致你一定要记住，
lines.en: The finest scene of the whole year, you must remember,

lines.pinyin: zuì shì chéng huáng jú lǜ shí
lines.zh: 那正是橙子金黄、橘子青绿的初冬时节啊。
lines.en: It is when oranges glow gold and tangerines turn green.

chars.zh: 荷花（多音字：hè 指负荷）。
美好（多音字：hào 指爱好）。

background.zh: 苏轼任杭州知州时写此诗赠送好友刘景文，勉励他珍惜壮年、保持气节。
background.en: Su Shi wrote this for his friend Liu Jingwen, urging him to value his prime and keep his integrity.

culture.zh: 诗中以菊枝傲霜象征坚贞品格，又点出初冬橙黄橘绿的丰收之美。
culture.en: The frost-braving chrysanthemum stands for integrity; the gold and green fruit mark early winter's bounty.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句对偶，借残荷败菊作对比，托物言志，寄寓劝勉之意。
rhetoric.en: Parallel opening couplets contrast faded lotus and chrysanthemum to convey moral encouragement.

sandhi.zh: "景"是上声，在非上声"文"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐng。
sandhi.en: 景 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 文; the written pinyin stays jǐng.

sandhi.zh: "已"是上声，在非上声"无"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐ。
sandhi.en: 已 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 无; the written pinyin stays yǐ.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"盖"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 盖; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"傲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 傲; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"年"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 年 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "好"在上声"景"前变读阳平（第二声）：hǎo→háo。
sandhi.en: 好 comes before the third-tone 景, so it is read in second tone: hǎo → háo.

sandhi.zh: "景"是上声，在非上声"君"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐng。
sandhi.en: 景 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 君; the written pinyin stays jǐng.

sandhi.zh: "最"是去声，在去声"是"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zuì。
sandhi.en: 最 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 是; the written pinyin stays zuì.

poems.title: 夜书所见
poems.titleEn: Written at Night of What I Saw
poems.author: 叶绍翁

lines.pinyin: xiāo xiāo wú yè sòng hán shēng
lines.zh: 瑟瑟的秋风吹动梧桐叶，送来阵阵寒意的声响，
lines.en: Rustling paulownia leaves carry a chilly sound.

lines.pinyin: jiāng shàng qiū fēng dòng kè qíng
lines.zh: 江面上的秋风更勾起了游子的思乡之情。
lines.en: Autumn wind on the river stirs a traveler's longing for home.

lines.pinyin: zhī yǒu ér tóng tiǎo cù zhī
lines.zh: 料想有孩子正在拨弄蟋蟀、逗它斗玩，
lines.en: I know children are out poking crickets to play.

lines.pinyin: yè shēn lí luò yī dēng míng
lines.zh: 因为夜深时分，篱笆旁还亮着一盏灯。
lines.en: Late at night, one lamp glows by the fence.

chars.zh: 用细棍拨弄（多音字：tiāo 指挑选）。
篱落，即篱笆（多音字：là 落下 lào 落枕）。

background.zh: 叶绍翁是南宋诗人，此诗写他客居在外、夜晚见秋景而思念家乡。
background.en: Ye Shaoweng, a Southern Song poet, wrote this on an autumn night abroad, missing home.

culture.zh: “挑促织”指儿童斗蟋蟀，是古代秋夜常见的童趣游戏。
culture.en: Poking crickets to make them fight was a common autumn-night game for children.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句借秋声秋风渲染思乡，后两句以儿童乐趣反衬游子孤独。
rhetoric.en: Autumn sounds evoke homesickness; children's play sets off the traveler's loneliness.

sandhi.zh: "所"是上声，在非上声"见"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：suǒ。
sandhi.en: 所 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 见; the written pinyin stays suǒ.

sandhi.zh: "动"是去声，在去声"客"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dòng。
sandhi.en: 动 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 客; the written pinyin stays dòng.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"儿"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 儿; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "挑"是上声，在非上声"促"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：tiǎo。
sandhi.en: 挑 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 促; the written pinyin stays tiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"灯"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 灯 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

lines.pinyin: tiān mén zhōng duàn chǔ jiāng kāi
lines.zh: 天门山被长江从中冲断，江水奔流而过把它劈开，
lines.en: Tianmen is split in two, cleaved open by the Chu River.

lines.pinyin: bì shuǐ dōng liú zhì cǐ huí
lines.zh: 碧绿的江水向东奔流，到这里又回旋折转。
lines.en: Green waters flowing east swirl back when they reach here.

lines.pinyin: liǎng àn qīng shān xiāng duì chū
lines.zh: 两岸的青山隔江相对，迎面矗立而出，
lines.en: Green peaks on both banks rise to face each other.

lines.pinyin: gū fān yī piàn rì biān lái
lines.zh: 一叶孤单的小船正从太阳升起的天边驶来。
lines.en: A lone sail comes drifting in from where the sun rises.

chars.zh: 中间（多音字：zhòng 指中奖）。
楚地，指长江流经古楚国一段。
互相（多音字：xiàng 指相貌）。

background.zh: 李白年轻时乘船东下，途经长江天门山，写下这首气势磅礴的写景诗。
background.en: The young Li Bai wrote this grand scene as he sailed east past Tianmen Mountain on the Yangtze.

culture.zh: 天门山指安徽东、西梁山，两山夹江对峙，形如天设之门。
culture.en: Tianmen Mountain is the pair of peaks in Anhui that face each other across the river like a heavenly gate.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗用“断、开、回、出、来”等动词，化静为动，描绘山水的雄奇气势。
rhetoric.en: Vivid verbs animate the still landscape, conveying the river and peaks' dramatic power.

sandhi.zh: "楚"是上声，在非上声"江"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：chǔ。
sandhi.en: 楚 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 江; the written pinyin stays chǔ.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"东"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 东; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "此"是上声，在非上声"回"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǐ。
sandhi.en: 此 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 回; the written pinyin stays cǐ.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"岸"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 岸; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"片"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 片 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

poems.title: 饮湖上初晴后雨
poems.titlePinyin: yǐn hú shàng chū qíng hòu yǔ
poems.titleEn: Drinking on the Lake, Clear Then Rainy
poems.author: 苏轼

lines.pinyin: shuǐ guāng liàn yàn qíng fāng hǎo
lines.zh: 晴天里西湖水波闪闪发光，正显得明媚美好，
lines.en: Sunlit ripples shimmer, the lake at its loveliest in clear weather.

lines.pinyin: shān sè kōng méng yǔ yì qí
lines.zh: 雨天里远山笼罩在迷蒙的烟雨中，也别有一番奇妙。
lines.en: Hills veiled in misty rain are wondrous too.

lines.pinyin: yù bǎ xī hú bǐ xī zǐ
lines.zh: 若要把美丽的西湖比作绝代佳人西施，
lines.en: If I would liken West Lake to the beauty Xizi,

lines.pinyin: dàn zhuāng nóng mǒ zǒng xiāng yí
lines.zh: 那么无论淡雅还是浓艳的妆扮，都同样美丽合宜。
lines.en: Light or heavy makeup, she is always just right.

chars.zh: 美好（多音字：hào 指爱好）。
空蒙，迷蒙朦胧（多音字：kòng 空闲）。
涂抹，指浓妆（多音字：mā 抹布 mò 抹墙）。
相宜，恰好合适（多音字：xiàng 相貌）。

background.zh: 苏轼任杭州通判时，在西湖游赏宴饮，先晴后雨，写下这首咏西湖的名作。
background.en: Su Shi wrote this on West Lake when, feasting by the water, the weather turned from clear to rain.

culture.zh: 西子即春秋美女西施；此后西湖又称“西子湖”，成为千古传诵的比喻。
culture.en: Xizi is the famed beauty Xi Shi; thereafter West Lake was also called Xizi Lake.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句对偶写晴雨之景，后两句以美人作比喻，新奇贴切，意蕴无穷。
rhetoric.en: Parallel lines paint sun and rain, then a fresh simile likens the lake to a beauty.

sandhi.zh: "饮"是上声，在非上声"湖"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐn。
sandhi.en: 饮 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 湖; the written pinyin stays yǐn.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"光"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 光; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "潋"是去声，在去声"滟"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：liàn。
sandhi.en: 潋 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 滟; the written pinyin stays liàn.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"亦"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 亦; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "把"是上声，在非上声"西"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎ。
sandhi.en: 把 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 西; the written pinyin stays bǎ.

sandhi.zh: "比"是上声，在非上声"西"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǐ。
sandhi.en: 比 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 西; the written pinyin stays bǐ.

sandhi.zh: "抹"在上声"总"前变读阳平（第二声）：mǒ→mó。
sandhi.en: 抹 comes before the third-tone 总, so it is read in second tone: mǒ → mó.

sandhi.zh: "总"是上声，在非上声"相"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒng。
sandhi.en: 总 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 相; the written pinyin stays zǒng.

lines.pinyin: hú guāng qiū yuè liǎng xiāng hé
lines.zh: 洞庭湖的水光与秋天的月色交相辉映，十分和谐，
lines.en: Lake sheen and autumn moon blend in perfect harmony.

lines.pinyin: tán miàn wú fēng jìng wèi mó
lines.zh: 湖面没有一丝风，平静得像一面没有磨亮的铜镜。
lines.en: No wind on the water — like a mirror not yet polished.

lines.pinyin: yáo wàng dòng tíng shān shuǐ cuì
lines.zh: 远远望去，洞庭湖的山水一片青翠苍茫，
lines.en: Gazing afar, Dongting's hills and waters are all green.

lines.pinyin: bái yín pán lǐ yī qīng luó
lines.zh: 就像一只白银的盘子里，盛着一枚青青的田螺。
lines.en: Like one green snail set in a silver plate.

chars.zh: 和谐（多音字：hè 应和 huó 和面 huò 和药）。
田螺，喻指洞庭湖中的君山。

background.zh: 刘禹锡是中唐诗人，此诗写他秋夜遥望洞庭湖的清丽月色。
background.en: Liu Yuxi, a Mid-Tang poet, wrote this gazing at Dongting Lake under the autumn moon.

culture.zh: “白银盘里一青螺”中的青螺指湖中君山，比喻新巧，传诵千古。
culture.en: The green snail is Mount Jun in the lake; the inventive image became famous.

rhetoric.zh: 连用比喻，把湖面比作未磨之镜、把湖山比作银盘青螺，想象奇特。
rhetoric.en: Successive similes liken the lake to an unpolished mirror and a snail on a silver plate.

sandhi.zh: "望"是去声，在去声"洞"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàng。
sandhi.en: 望 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 洞; the written pinyin stays wàng.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"相"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 相; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "镜"是去声，在去声"未"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jìng。
sandhi.en: 镜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 未; the written pinyin stays jìng.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"翠"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 翠; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"一"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 一; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"青"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 青 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

lines.pinyin: zhāo cí bái dì cǎi yún jiān
lines.zh: 清晨我告别了高耸在彩云之间的白帝城，
lines.en: At dawn I leave Baidi amid the rosy clouds.

lines.pinyin: qiān lǐ jiāng líng yī rì huán
lines.zh: 千里之外的江陵，只用一天就能顺流返回。
lines.en: A thousand li to Jiangling, returned in a single day.

lines.pinyin: liǎng àn yuán shēng tí bù zhù
lines.zh: 两岸的猿猴不停地啼叫，声声相连，
lines.en: Apes on both banks cry without cease.

lines.pinyin: qīng zhōu yǐ guò wàn chóng shān
lines.zh: 轻快的小船已经驶过了千山万岭。
lines.en: The light boat has already passed ten thousand peaks.

chars.zh: 早晨（多音字：cháo 指朝向、朝代）。
中间（多音字：jiàn 指间隔）。
返回（多音字：hái 指还有）。
重叠；层（多音字：zhòng 指重量）。

background.zh: 李白流放夜郎途中遇赦，乘舟东返，在白帝城写下这首充满喜悦的诗。
background.en: Pardoned mid-exile, Li Bai sailed home down the Yangtze and wrote this joyful poem at Baidi.

culture.zh: 白帝城在今重庆奉节，是长江三峡西端的名城，地势高峻。
culture.en: Baidi City, in today's Fengjie, Chongqing, stands high at the western end of the Three Gorges.

rhetoric.zh: 用夸张写舟行之速，以猿声、万重山反衬轻快，全诗洋溢欢快之情。
rhetoric.en: Hyperbole conveys the swift voyage; ape cries and countless peaks heighten the buoyant mood.

sandhi.zh: "早"是上声，在非上声"发"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǎo。
sandhi.en: 早 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 发; the written pinyin stays zǎo.

sandhi.zh: "彩"是上声，在非上声"云"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 彩 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 云; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"江"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 江; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"日"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 日 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"岸"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 岸; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"住"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 住 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "已"是上声，在非上声"过"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐ。
sandhi.en: 已 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 过; the written pinyin stays yǐ.

lines.pinyin: hé yè luó qún yī sè cái
lines.zh: 采莲女的绿罗裙和荷叶仿佛是用同一种颜色裁成的，
lines.en: Lotus leaves and silk skirts seem cut from the same green.

lines.pinyin: fú róng xiàng liǎn liǎng biān kāi
lines.zh: 荷花朝着采莲女的脸庞在两旁竞相开放。
lines.en: Lotus blossoms open on both sides toward her face.

lines.pinyin: luàn rù chí zhōng kàn bù jiàn
lines.zh: 她们划入荷塘深处，便与花叶融在一起看不见了，
lines.en: They slip into the pond and vanish among the blooms.

lines.pinyin: wén gē shǐ jué yǒu rén lái
lines.zh: 直到听见歌声，才发觉原来有人正划船过来。
lines.en: Only her song reveals that someone is there.

chars.zh: 荷叶（多音字：hè 指负荷）。
中间；里面（多音字：zhòng 指中奖）。
看见（多音字：kān 指看守）。
觉察；发觉（多音字：jiào 指睡觉）。

background.zh: 王昌龄是盛唐诗人，此诗描绘江南水乡少女采莲的清新场景。
background.en: Wang Changling, a High Tang poet, depicts girls gathering lotus in the southern waterlands.

culture.zh: 采莲是江南水乡的传统劳动，“采莲曲”是乐府旧题，多写采莲女的生活。
culture.en: Lotus gathering was a southern tradition; 'Song of Lotus Gathering' is an old yuefu theme.

rhetoric.zh: 以荷叶比罗裙、以芙蓉映人脸，人花难辨，再以歌声点出人来，构思巧妙。
rhetoric.en: Leaves blend with skirts and blossoms with faces; only a song reveals the hidden girls.

sandhi.zh: "采"是上声，在非上声"莲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 采 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 莲; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"色"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 色 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "脸"在上声"两"前变读阳平（第二声）：liǎn→lián。
sandhi.en: 脸 comes before the third-tone 两, so it is read in second tone: liǎn → lián.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"边"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 边; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "乱"是去声，在去声"入"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：luàn。
sandhi.en: 乱 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 入; the written pinyin stays luàn.

sandhi.zh: "看"是去声，在去声"不"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：kàn。
sandhi.en: 看 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 不; the written pinyin stays kàn.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"见"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 见 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "始"是上声，在非上声"觉"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǐ。
sandhi.en: 始 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 觉; the written pinyin stays shǐ.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"人"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 人; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

lines.pinyin: chí rì jiāng shān lì
lines.zh: 春日的阳光照耀着江山，使它格外美丽。
lines.en: Under the long spring sun the rivers and hills are beautiful.

lines.pinyin: chūn fēng huā cǎo xiāng
lines.zh: 春风送来花草的芳香。
lines.en: The spring breeze carries the fragrance of flowers and grass.

lines.pinyin: ní róng fēi yàn zi
lines.zh: 泥土湿润松软，燕子衔泥飞来飞去筑巢。
lines.en: The mud has thawed, and swallows fly about building nests.

lines.pinyin: shā nuǎn shuì yuān yāng
lines.zh: 沙滩温暖，鸳鸯静静地睡在上面。
lines.en: The sand is warm, and mandarin ducks sleep upon it.

chars.zh: 迟日，指春天太阳落得晚、白昼渐长。
太阳；这里指春日的阳光。

background.zh: 此诗作于杜甫定居成都草堂时，描绘初春景色。
background.en: Written while Du Fu lived at his Chengdu thatched cottage, depicting early spring.

culture.zh: 杜甫被尊为“诗圣”，其诗多写实，被称为“诗史”。
culture.en: Du Fu is honored as the Sage of Poetry, his realistic verse called a history in poems.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗对仗工整，动静结合，色香味俱全地描绘春景。
rhetoric.en: Neat parallelism blends motion and stillness to paint a vivid spring scene.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"香"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 香; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

sandhi.zh: "暖"是上声，在非上声"睡"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nuǎn。
sandhi.en: 暖 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 睡; the written pinyin stays nuǎn.

poems.title: 惠崇春江晚景
poems.titlePinyin: huì chóng chūn jiāng wǎn jǐng
poems.titleEn: Huichong's Evening Scene on the Spring River
poems.author: 苏轼

lines.pinyin: zhú wài táo huā sān liǎng zhī
lines.zh: 竹林外面桃花开了三两枝。
lines.en: Beyond the bamboo, two or three sprigs of peach blossoms have opened.

lines.pinyin: chūn jiāng shuǐ nuǎn yā xiān zhī
lines.zh: 春天江水变暖，鸭子最先感知到。
lines.en: When the spring river warms, the ducks are the first to know.

lines.pinyin: lóu hāo mǎn dì lú yá duǎn
lines.zh: 蒌蒿长满了地面，芦苇的嫩芽还很短。
lines.en: Wormwood fills the ground, and the reed shoots are still short.

lines.pinyin: zhèng shì hé tún yù shàng shí
lines.zh: 正是河豚将要逆流而上的时候。
lines.en: This is just the time when the pufferfish are about to swim upstream.

background.zh: 这是苏轼为僧人惠崇所画《春江晚景》题写的诗。
background.en: Su Shi inscribed this poem on a spring-river painting by the monk Huichong.

culture.zh: 苏轼是北宋文学大家，“唐宋八大家”之一。
culture.en: Su Shi was a great Northern Song writer, one of the Eight Masters of Tang and Song.

rhetoric.zh: 由画面想象到画外的河豚，虚实结合，富有生机。
rhetoric.en: Imagining the unseen pufferfish from the painting blends the real and the imagined.

sandhi.zh: "晚"在上声"景"前变读阳平（第二声）：wǎn→wán。
sandhi.en: 晚 comes before the third-tone 景, so it is read in second tone: wǎn → wán.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"枝"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 枝; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "水"在上声"暖"前变读阳平（第二声）：shuǐ→shuí。
sandhi.en: 水 comes before the third-tone 暖, so it is read in second tone: shuǐ → shuí.

sandhi.zh: "暖"是上声，在非上声"鸭"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nuǎn。
sandhi.en: 暖 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鸭; the written pinyin stays nuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"地"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 地; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.zh: "正"是去声，在去声"是"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zhèng。
sandhi.en: 正 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 是; the written pinyin stays zhèng.

sandhi.zh: "欲"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yù。
sandhi.en: 欲 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays yù.

lines.pinyin: méi zi huáng shí rì rì qíng
lines.zh: 梅子变黄成熟的时节，天天都是晴天。
lines.en: In the season when plums ripen yellow, every day is clear.

lines.pinyin: xiǎo xī fàn jìn què shān xíng
lines.zh: 乘小船到小溪的尽头，再改走山路前行。
lines.en: Having boated to the stream's end, I then travel on by mountain path.

lines.pinyin: lǜ yīn bù jiǎn lái shí lù
lines.zh: 山路上绿树成荫，不比来时的路逊色。
lines.en: The green shade is no less than on the path by which I came.

lines.pinyin: tiān dé huáng lí sì wǔ shēng
lines.zh: 还增添了黄鹂鸟的四五声啼鸣。
lines.en: And there are added four or five calls of the oriole.

chars.zh: 黄色；这里指梅子成熟变黄。
行走（多音字：háng 指行列）。
得到、增添了（多音字：de 助词，děi 必须）。
黄鹂，一种鸣声悦耳的鸟。

background.zh: 诗人初夏游浙江三衢山，记下沿途山行所见。
background.en: The poet records sights from a journey through Mount Sanqu in early summer.

culture.zh: 曾几是南宋诗人，此诗是描写初夏风光的名篇。
culture.en: Zeng Ji was a Southern Song poet, and this is a famed early-summer landscape poem.

rhetoric.zh: 以“日日晴”“添黄鹂声”写出旅途的轻快愉悦。
rhetoric.en: Sunny days and birdsong convey the lightness and joy of the journey.

sandhi.zh: "日"是去声，在去声"日"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：rì。
sandhi.en: 日 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 日; the written pinyin stays rì.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"溪"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 溪; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "泛"是去声，在去声"尽"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：fàn。
sandhi.en: 泛 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 尽; the written pinyin stays fàn.

sandhi.zh: "减"是上声，在非上声"来"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǎn。
sandhi.en: 减 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 来; the written pinyin stays jiǎn.

sandhi.zh: "五"是上声，在非上声"声"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǔ。
sandhi.en: 五 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 声; the written pinyin stays wǔ.

poems.title: 忆江南
poems.titleEn: Recalling the South (to the tune Yi Jiangnan)
poems.author: 白居易

lines.pinyin: jiāng nán hǎo
lines.zh: 江南的风光多么美好。
lines.en: The land south of the river is fine.

lines.pinyin: fēng jǐng jiù céng ān
lines.zh: 那里的风景我从前就很熟悉。
lines.en: Its scenery I knew well long ago.

lines.pinyin: rì chū jiāng huā hóng shèng huǒ
lines.zh: 太阳升起时，江边的花红得胜过火焰。
lines.en: At sunrise the riverside blossoms are redder than fire.

lines.pinyin: chūn lái jiāng shuǐ lǜ rú lán
lines.zh: 春天到来，江水碧绿得像蓝草一样。
lines.en: When spring comes, the river water is green as indigo.

lines.pinyin: néng bù yì jiāng nán
lines.zh: 怎能不让人怀念江南呢？
lines.en: How could one not recall the southland?

chars.zh: 江；江南指长江以南地区。

background.zh: 白居易曾在江南任职，晚年回洛阳后写下此词怀念江南。
background.en: Bai Juyi served in the south and later wrote this lyric in Luoyang, recalling it.

culture.zh: 这是一首词，词牌为“忆江南”，常用于咏怀江南风物。
culture.en: This is a ci lyric set to the tune Yi Jiangnan, often used to praise the southland.

rhetoric.zh: 用“红胜火”“绿如蓝”的鲜明对比，描绘江南春色。
rhetoric.en: Vivid color contrasts of fiery red and indigo green paint the southern spring.

sandhi.zh: "景"是上声，在非上声"旧"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐng。
sandhi.en: 景 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 旧; the written pinyin stays jǐng.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"绿"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 绿; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"忆"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 忆 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

lines.pinyin: bào zhú shēng zhōng yī suì chú
lines.zh: 在阵阵爆竹声中，旧的一年过去了。
lines.en: Amid the sound of firecrackers, the old year passes away.

lines.pinyin: chūn fēng sòng nuǎn rù tú sū
lines.zh: 春风送来暖意，人们畅饮屠苏酒。
lines.en: The spring breeze brings warmth as people drink Tusu wine.

lines.pinyin: qiān mén wàn hù tóng tóng rì
lines.zh: 初升的太阳照耀着千家万户。
lines.en: The rising sun shines bright on every household.

lines.pinyin: zǒng bǎ xīn táo huàn jiù fú
lines.zh: 人们总是用新的桃符换下旧的桃符。
lines.en: Everyone replaces old peachwood charms with new ones.

chars.zh: 中间、当中（多音字：zhòng 射中）。
屠苏，一种新年饮的药酒。
曈曈，太阳初升时明亮的样子。

background.zh: 王安石变法时所作，借新年气象抒发革新的喜悦与抱负。
background.en: Written during Wang Anshi's reforms, expressing the joy and hope of renewal.

culture.zh: 诗中放爆竹、饮屠苏、换桃符都是古代春节的习俗。
culture.en: Firecrackers, Tusu wine, and peachwood charms were old New Year customs.

rhetoric.zh: “千门万户”夸张写出家家迎新，气氛热烈。
rhetoric.en: The hyperbole of countless households conveys the lively New Year mood.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"岁"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 岁 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "暖"是上声，在非上声"入"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：nuǎn。
sandhi.en: 暖 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 入; the written pinyin stays nuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "万"是去声，在去声"户"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàn。
sandhi.en: 万 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 户; the written pinyin stays wàn.

sandhi.zh: "总"在上声"把"前变读阳平（第二声）：zǒng→zóng。
sandhi.en: 总 comes before the third-tone 把, so it is read in second tone: zǒng → zóng.

sandhi.zh: "把"是上声，在非上声"新"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：bǎ。
sandhi.en: 把 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 新; the written pinyin stays bǎ.

sandhi.zh: "换"是去声，在去声"旧"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：huàn。
sandhi.en: 换 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 旧; the written pinyin stays huàn.

lines.pinyin: qīng míng shí jié yǔ fēn fēn
lines.zh: 清明节这天，细雨纷纷地下个不停。
lines.en: At the Qingming season the rain falls thick and fast.

lines.pinyin: lù shàng xíng rén yù duàn hún
lines.zh: 路上赶路的行人个个伤心欲绝。
lines.en: Travelers on the road feel their hearts breaking with grief.

lines.pinyin: jiè wèn jiǔ jiā hé chù yǒu
lines.zh: 请问哪里有酒家可以歇脚饮酒？
lines.en: May I ask where a tavern can be found?

lines.pinyin: mù tóng yáo zhǐ xìng huā cūn
lines.zh: 放牛的孩子远远地指向杏花盛开的村庄。
lines.en: The herdboy points afar to a village amid apricot blossoms.

chars.zh: 行走；行人指赶路的人（多音字：háng 行列）。
儿童；牧童指放牛的孩子。

background.zh: 诗写清明时节诗人在雨中赶路、问路饮酒的情景。
background.en: It depicts the poet traveling and seeking a tavern in the Qingming rain.

culture.zh: 清明是祭祖扫墓、踏青的传统节日。
culture.en: Qingming is the festival for tomb-sweeping, honoring ancestors, and spring outings.

rhetoric.zh: 由问到答，以牧童遥指作结，余味悠长，画面生动。
rhetoric.en: A question answered by the herdboy's distant gesture leaves a lingering, vivid image.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"纷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 纷; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "路"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lù。
sandhi.en: 路 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays lù.

sandhi.zh: "欲"是去声，在去声"断"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yù。
sandhi.en: 欲 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 断; the written pinyin stays yù.

sandhi.zh: "借"是去声，在去声"问"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jiè。
sandhi.en: 借 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 问; the written pinyin stays jiè.

sandhi.zh: "酒"是上声，在非上声"家"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 酒 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 家; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "指"是上声，在非上声"杏"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǐ。
sandhi.en: 指 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 杏; the written pinyin stays zhǐ.

poems.title: 九月九日忆山东兄弟
poems.titlePinyin: jiǔ yuè jiǔ rì yì shān dōng xiōng dì
poems.titleEn: Thinking of My Brothers East of the Mountains on the Double Ninth
poems.author: 王维

lines.pinyin: dú zài yì xiāng wéi yì kè
lines.zh: 我独自一人在他乡做客。
lines.en: Alone in a strange land, I am a stranger and guest.

lines.pinyin: měi féng jiā jié bèi sī qīn
lines.zh: 每逢美好的节日就更加思念亲人。
lines.en: Each festival doubles my longing for my kin.

lines.pinyin: yáo zhī xiōng dì dēng gāo chù
lines.zh: 我在远方料想，兄弟们登上了高处。
lines.en: From afar I know my brothers have climbed to the heights.

lines.pinyin: biàn chā zhū yú shǎo yī rén
lines.zh: 他们都插戴茱萸，却唯独少了我一个人。
lines.en: All wearing dogwood sprigs, they are one person short.

chars.zh: 别的、他乡的；异客指外乡人。
做、作为（多音字：wèi 为了）。
客人；异客指漂泊在外的人。
美好；佳节指美好的节日。
遥远；遥知指在远方料想。

background.zh: 王维十七岁时客居长安，重阳节思念家乡亲人而作。
background.en: Wang Wei wrote this at seventeen while in Chang'an, missing his family on the Double Ninth.

culture.zh: 重阳节有登高、插茱萸、赏菊等习俗。
culture.en: The Double Ninth features climbing heights, wearing dogwood, and viewing chrysanthemums.

rhetoric.zh: 由自身之思转写兄弟之缺，曲折表达深切思乡之情。
rhetoric.en: Shifting from his own longing to the brothers' missing one deepens the homesick feeling.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"月"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 月; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"日"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 日; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "每"是上声，在非上声"逢"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：měi。
sandhi.en: 每 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 逢; the written pinyin stays měi.

sandhi.zh: "少"是上声，在非上声"一"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǎo。
sandhi.en: 少 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 一; the written pinyin stays shǎo.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"人"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 人 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

lines.pinyin: dú lián yōu cǎo jiàn biān shēng
lines.zh: 我唯独喜爱那生长在涧边的幽静青草。
lines.en: I alone love the quiet grass growing by the brook.

lines.pinyin: shàng yǒu huáng lí shēn shù míng
lines.zh: 树丛深处有黄鹂在上面鸣叫。
lines.en: Above, an oriole sings deep among the trees.

lines.pinyin: chūn cháo dài yǔ wǎn lái jí
lines.zh: 春天的潮水带着雨，到傍晚涨得更急。
lines.en: The spring tide, bringing rain, runs swift as evening comes.

lines.pinyin: yě dù wú rén zhōu zì héng
lines.zh: 荒野的渡口没有人，只有小船自在地横在水面。
lines.en: At the wild ferry no one is there, only a boat drifting crosswise.

chars.zh: 横着、横放（多音字：hèng 蛮横）。

background.zh: 韦应物任滁州刺史时游西涧，写下这首山水诗。
background.en: Wei Yingwu wrote this while serving as governor of Chuzhou, visiting the West Brook.

culture.zh: 韦应物是中唐山水田园诗的代表诗人之一。
culture.en: Wei Yingwu was a leading mid-Tang poet of landscape and pastoral verse.

rhetoric.zh: 以“舟自横”的静景作结，意境恬淡，画面悠远。
rhetoric.en: Ending with the idle drifting boat creates a tranquil, far-reaching mood.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"涧"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 涧; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"黄"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 黄; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "雨"在上声"晚"前变读阳平（第二声）：yǔ→yú。
sandhi.en: 雨 comes before the third-tone 晚, so it is read in second tone: yǔ → yú.

sandhi.zh: "晚"是上声，在非上声"来"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǎn。
sandhi.en: 晚 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 来; the written pinyin stays wǎn.

sandhi.zh: "野"是上声，在非上声"渡"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yě。
sandhi.en: 野 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 渡; the written pinyin stays yě.

lines.pinyin: rén jiān sì yuè fāng fēi jìn
lines.zh: 四月里，山下的花儿都已凋谢了。
lines.en: In the human world the April blossoms have all faded.

lines.pinyin: shān sì táo huā shǐ shèng kāi
lines.zh: 山上寺庙里的桃花才刚刚盛开。
lines.en: But at the mountain temple the peach flowers have just bloomed.

lines.pinyin: cháng hèn chūn guī wú mì chù
lines.zh: 我常常遗憾春天归去后再也找不到它。
lines.en: I had long lamented that spring, once gone, could not be found.

lines.pinyin: bù zhī zhuǎn rù cǐ zhōng lái
lines.zh: 却没想到它竟悄悄转移到这山中来了。
lines.en: Not knowing it had quietly come into this place.

chars.zh: 间；人间指世间（多音字：jiàn 间隔）。
芳菲，指花草的香气与美色。
芳菲，指花草盛美（多音字：fěi 菲薄）。
茂盛；盛开指开得旺（多音字：chéng 盛饭）。
常常、长久（多音字：zhǎng 生长）。
转移、转入（多音字：zhuàn 旋转）。
里面；此中指这山里（多音字：zhòng 射中）。

background.zh: 白居易游庐山大林寺，见山中桃花盛开而作此诗。
background.en: Bai Juyi wrote this on seeing peach blossoms in full bloom at Dalin Temple on Mount Lu.

culture.zh: 山高气温低，花期推迟，诗中暗含这一自然现象。
culture.en: Higher altitude and cooler air delay blooming, a natural fact hinted at in the poem.

rhetoric.zh: 用拟人手法把春天写成可以“转入”山中的人，新奇有趣。
rhetoric.en: Personifying spring as something that can move into the mountains is fresh and playful.

sandhi.zh: "四"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sì。
sandhi.en: 四 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays sì.

sandhi.zh: "始"是上声，在非上声"盛"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǐ。
sandhi.en: 始 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 盛; the written pinyin stays shǐ.

sandhi.zh: "转"是上声，在非上声"入"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhuǎn。
sandhi.en: 转 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 入; the written pinyin stays zhuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "此"是上声，在非上声"中"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǐ。
sandhi.en: 此 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 中; the written pinyin stays cǐ.
